sqlMap.select: SELECT C.COIN_VOL "coinVol" , C.GRP2_NO "grp2No" , C.CNTR_NO "cntrNo" , C.COIN_NO "coinNo" , C.COIN_YEARS "coinYears" , C.COIN_YEAR2S "coinYear2s" , CG.CODE_NAME "grp2Name" , CC.CODE_NAME "cntrName" , CN.CODE_NAME "coinName" , CN.CODE_ETC "coinEtc" , COALESCE(CT.cnt, 0) "cntrCnt" FROM COIN C LEFT JOIN CODE CG ON CG.CODE_DIV = 'GRP2' AND CG.CODE_NO = C.GRP2_NO LEFT JOIN CODE CC ON CC.CODE_DIV = 'CNTR' AND CC.CODE_NO = C.CNTR_NO LEFT JOIN CODE CN ON CN.CODE_DIV = 'COIN' AND CN.CODE_NO = C.COIN_NO LEFT JOIN (SELECT CNTR_NO, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COIN GROUP BY CNTR_NO) CT ON CT.CNTR_NO = C.CNTR_NO ORDER BY C.COIN_VOL, C.GRP2_NO, C.CNTR_NO, C.COIN_NO
